name: Endeavour Mining plc
description: Endeavour Mining is a leading global gold producer and the largest in West Africa, with operating assets across Senegal, Cote d'Ivoire, and Burkina Faso. The company maintains a strong portfolio of high-quality mines and a significant pipeline of development projects and exploration assets within the highly prospective Birimian Greenstone Belt. Endeavour is committed to sustainable mining practices and delivering long-term value to its shareholders while maintaining a disciplined approach to capital allocation and operational excellence in one of the world's most prolific gold-producing regions.
